🖥️ POS Settings
PDF Invoice Settings
Live Preview
💳 Payment Methods
Enable payment methods and enter your handles. Enabled methods appear on customer invoice links so they can pay instantly.
🔔 Notification Settings
Control how you are alerted when customers respond to estimates.
🔊 Notification Sound
Play a chime when a customer approves, declines, or sends a question on an estimate.
Click to preview the notification chime.
🔄 Auto-Refresh Interval
The app checks Supabase every 45 seconds for new customer responses while you're logged in.
Manually trigger a check immediately.
📬 What triggers a notification?
✅ Customer approves an estimate
❌ Customer declines an estimate
💬 Customer sends a question or message
Expense Categories
Customize the categories available when recording expenses
* Default categories cannot be deleted but can be renamed. Custom categories can be fully removed.
⚠️
Danger Zone
Irreversible actions. Proceed with extreme caution.
Wipe All Business Data
Permanently deletes: clients, invoices, estimates, jobs, transactions, expenses,
messages, pos items, activity log, access requests, inventory, purchase orders.
Keeps: app users, roles, business settings.
Reset to Fresh Install
Wipes all business data AND removes all users except Admin and Developer accounts.
Use this to hand off a clean instance or start completely fresh.
